title: can you take our EWW members, cross reference with axibridge and show me members and trials when they last joined raid?

turns.userText: can you take our EWW members, cross reference with axibridge and show me members and trials when they last joined raid?
turns.agentText:
Let me look up the guild ID and read the attendance data at the same time.

Good — EWW is **Engaging Without Warning** (`EA176DD1-F15B-ED11-81A9-8FB5CFBE7766`). The attendance blob is too large to read whole. Let me fetch EWW members and re-pull attendance with a tighter date window simultaneously.

The attendance blob is a single line and can't be chunked — I don't have shell access. Let me pull a much tighter window (last 60 days) to get a response that fits.

The attendance rollup always returns the full dataset. Let me try per-player stats instead for EWW members.

`axibridge_player_stats` lets me filter by account list, which will return a much smaller payload. Let me query just EWW Members and Trials.

Got everything I need. Here's the full cross-reference — **62 Members + 3 Trials**, sorted by last raid date.

---
